ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 ROKRAT / Chinotto C2 over pCloud, Yandex Disk and Dropbox APIs
ucs.description: Hunts APT37's signature use of legitimate cloud-storage REST APIs (pCloud, Yandex Disk, Dropbox, Box) as C2 and exfil channels. ROKRAT, Chinotto and Dolphin all proxy command/exfil traffic through these providers, originating from non-browser/non-cloud-client processes — a pattern Microsoft tracks under DEV-0193/Reaper and Mandiant calls TEMP.Reaper.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(All_Traffic.dest) as dest values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as dest_port values(All_Traffic.bytes_out) as bytes_out from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest_category="cloud_storage" OR All_Traffic.dest="*pcloud.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="api.pcloud.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="*yandex.net" OR All_Traffic.dest="cloud-api.yandex.net" OR All_Traffic.dest="*dropboxapi.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="content.dropboxapi.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="*box.com") by All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.user All_Traffic.app All_Traffic.process All_Traffic.dest host _time span=1h | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)` | search NOT process IN ("*\\chrome.exe","*\\msedge.exe","*\\firefox.exe","*\\Dropbox.exe","*\\Yandex.Disk.exe","*\\pCloud.exe","*\\OneDrive.exe","*\\teams.exe","*\\outlook.exe") | join type=inner src process [| tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe") OR Processes.process IN ("*Authorization: bearer*","*OAuth*","*\\Public\\*.dat","*Hangul*")) by Processes.dest Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.user _time | rename Processes.dest as src Processes.process_name as proc_name Processes.process as cmdline] | stats count values(dest) as cloud_dest values(cmdline) as cmdline sum(bytes_out) as bytes_out by src user proc_name | where bytes_out > 50000 OR count > 5
ucs.kql:
let CloudC2Domains = dynamic(["api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","upload.box.com","api.box.com"]);
let LegitCloudClients = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","dropbox.exe","yandex.disk.exe","pcloud.exe","onedrive.exe","teams.exe","outlook.exe"]);
let SuspectProcs = DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where RemoteUrl has_any (CloudC2Domains)
         or (RemoteUrl endswith "pcloud.com" or RemoteUrl endswith "yandex.net" or RemoteUrl endswith "dropboxapi.com")
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ (LegitCloudClients)
    | where RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName,
              InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
              InitiatingProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessAccountName,
              RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, RemotePort;
SuspectProcs
| summarize ConnCount = count(),
            CloudTargets = make_set(RemoteUrl, 25),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp), LastSeen = max(Timestamp),
            SampleCmd = any(InitiatingProcessCommandLine)
            by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName,
               InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessFolderPath
| where ConnCount >= 3
   or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","hwp.exe","hwpx.exe")
   or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\AppData\Roaming\", @"\Public\", @"\ProgramData\")
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let CloudC2Domains = dynamic(["api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","upload.box.com","api.box.com"]);
let LegitCloudClients = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","dropbox.exe","yandex.disk.exe","pcloud.exe","onedrive.exe","teams.exe","outlook.exe"]);
ImNetworkSession
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where DstHostname has_any (CloudC2Domains)
     or DstHostname endswith "pcloud.com"
     or DstHostname endswith "yandex.net"
     or DstHostname endswith "dropboxapi.com"
| extend ProcLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(ActingProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| where ProcLeaf !in~ (LegitCloudClients)
| summarize ConnCount = count(),
            CloudTargets = make_set(DstHostname, 25),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen  = max(TimeGenerated),
            SampleCmd = any(ActingProcessCommandLine)
            by DvcHostname, SrcUsername, ActingProcessName, ProcLeaf
| where ConnCount >= 3
   or ProcLeaf in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","hwp.exe","hwpx.exe")
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.rationale: APT37's ROKRAT, Chinotto, Dolphin and CLOUDBURST families are unique among APTs in their consistent abuse of pCloud and Yandex Disk REST APIs (less commonly Dropbox/Box) for both C2 and staged exfil — documented by Cisco Talos, Volexity (InkySquid) and ESET. Excluding the legitimate native sync clients and browsers leaves a tight set of LOLBins and AppData-resident binaries reaching those exact AP

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `ActingProcessName` is not a column of ImNetworkSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.
`ActingProcessCommandLine` is not a column of ImNetworkSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.
`ActorUsername` is not a column of ImNetworkSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImAuthentication, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.

ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 HWP/HWPX & weaponized-LNK delivery spawning script interpreters
ucs.description: Detects APT37's hallmark initial-access chain: a Hangul Word Processor document (HWP/HWPX) opened by gswin32c/hwp.exe, or a malicious LNK delivered by phishing/zip, spawning powershell/mshta/rundll32 with download-cradle or base64 payloads — the canonical ScarCruft/Group123 entry vector against ROK government, defectors and journalists.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd values(Processes.process_hash) as child_hash from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("hwp.exe","hwpx.exe","gswin32c.exe","gswin64c.exe","hncapp.exe","hwp_x64.exe") OR (Processes.parent_process_name="explorer.exe" AND Processes.parent_process IN ("*.lnk*","*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*\\*.lnk*")) OR Processes.parent_process_name IN ("WINWORD.EXE","EXCEL.EXE") AND Processes.parent_process IN ("*.hwp*","*.hwpx*")) AND Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","curl.exe") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval susp_cradle=if(match(cmdline,"(?i)(EncodedCommand|-enc\s|FromBase64String|DownloadString|DownloadFile|Invoke-Expression|IEX|Net\.WebClient|Start-BitsTransfer|certutil.*-urlcache|mshta.*http|regsvr32.*scrobj|rundll32.*url\.dll)"),1,0) | eval susp_path=if(match(cmdline,"(?i)(\\\\AppData\\\\|\\\\Public\\\\|\\\\ProgramData\\\\|\\\\Temp\\\\)"),1,0) | where susp_cradle=1 OR susp_path=1 OR parent_process_name IN ("hwp.exe","hwpx.exe","gswin32c.exe","hncapp.exe") | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort -lastTime
ucs.kql:
let HangulParents = dynamic(["hwp.exe","hwpx.exe","hwp_x64.exe","hncapp.exe","gswin32c.exe","gswin64c.exe"]);
let ScriptChildren = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","curl.exe"]);
let SuspectCradle = @"(?i)(EncodedCommand|-enc\s|FromBase64String|DownloadString|DownloadFile|Invoke-Expression|\bIEX\b|Net\.WebClient|Start-BitsTransfer|certutil.*-urlcache|mshta\s+http|regsvr32.*scrobj|rundll32.*url\.dll|\\AppData\\|\\Public\\|\\ProgramData\\|\\Temp\\)";
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where FileName in~ (ScriptChildren)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (HangulParents)
   or (InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "explorer.exe"
        and InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any (".lnk", @"\Temp\", @"\Downloads\"))
   or InitiatingProcessParentFileName in~ (HangulParents)
   or (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe")
        and InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any (".hwp",".hwpx"))
| where ProcessCommandLine matches regex SuspectCradle
   or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (HangulParents)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          GrandParent = InitiatingProcessParentFileName,
          Child = FileName,
          ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          ChildSHA256 = SHA256,
          IsRemoteSession = InitiatingProcessIntegrityLevel
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let HangulParents = dynamic(["hwp.exe","hwpx.exe","hwp_x64.exe","hncapp.exe","gswin32c.exe","gswin64c.exe"]);
let ScriptChildren = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","curl.exe"]);
let SuspectCradle = @"(?i)(EncodedCommand|-enc\s|FromBase64String|DownloadString|DownloadFile|Invoke-Expression|\bIEX\b|Net\.WebClient|Start-BitsTransfer|certutil.*-urlcache|mshta\s+http|regsvr32.*scrobj|rundll32.*url\.dll|\\AppData\\|\\Public\\|\\ProgramData\\|\\Temp\\)";
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend ChildLeaf  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1])),
         ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| where ChildLeaf in~ (ScriptChildren)
| where ParentLeaf in~ (HangulParents)
   or (ParentLeaf == "explorer.exe" and CommandLine has_any (".lnk", @"\Temp\", @"\Downloads\"))
   or (ParentLeaf in~ ("winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe")
        and CommandLine has_any (".hwp",".hwpx"))
| where CommandLine matches regex SuspectCradle
   or ParentLeaf in~ (HangulParents)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
          Parent = ParentProcessName, ParentLeaf,
          Child  = NewProcessName,    ChildLeaf,
          CommandLine, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT37 ScarCruft Hangul/LNK to Script-Interpreter Chain
id: 5b0f8a2e-4c2f-4d8e-9c2a-37scarcruft01
status: experimental
description: Detects ScarCruft/APT37 initial-access chain where a Hangul Word Processor (HWP/HWPX) viewer or a phishing-delivered LNK spawns a Windows script interpreter or LOLBin with a download cradle.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0067/
  - https://blog.talosintelligence.com/rokrat-reloaded/
  - https://www.welivesecurity.com/2022/11/30/whos-swimming-south-korean-waters-meet-scarcrufts-dolphin/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/06
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1566.001
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.t1203
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1218
  - attack.g0067
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  hangul_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\hwp.exe'
      - '\hwpx.exe'
      - '\hwp_x64.exe'
      - '\hncapp.exe'
      - '\gswin32c.exe'
      - '\gswin64c.exe'
  lnk_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith: '\explorer.exe'
    ParentCommandLine|contains:
      - '.lnk'
      - '\Temp\'
      - '\Downloads\'
  script_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\regsvr32.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
      - '\certutil.exe'
      - '\bitsadmin.exe'
      - '\curl.exe'
  cradle:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '-EncodedCommand'
      - '-enc '
      - 'FromBase64String'
      - 'DownloadString'
      - 'DownloadFile'
      - 'Invoke-Expression'
      - 'IEX'
      - 'Net.WebClient'
      - 'Start-BitsTransfer'
      - '-urlcache'
      - 'mshta http'
      - 'scrobj'
      - '\AppData\'
      - '\Public\'
      - '\ProgramData\'
  condition: script_child and ((hangul_parent) or (lnk_parent and cradle) or (script_child and hangul_parent))
falsepositives:
  - Korean enterprise IT scripts launched from HWP automation (rare; baseline 30 days)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Hangul Word Processor (hwp.exe/hncapp.exe/gswin32c.exe) is APT37's near-exclusive lure container — extensively documented by Cisco Talos (Group123/ROKRAT), ESET (Dolphin), Kaspersky (ScarCruft) and Microsoft (Reaper). Outside South Korean orgs, a hwp/hwpx process spawning powershell/mshta/rundll32 is essentially diagnostic; combined with weaponized-LNK delivery (Goldbackdoor, RokRAT droppers) this
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
